title: Symphony of Life
writer: Ivan Pyrev, Evgeniy Pomeshchikov, Nikolai Rozhkov
actors: Vladimir Druzhnikov, Marina Ladynina, Boris Andreyev
plot: His right hand having been wounded during the war, concert pianist Andrei Balashov is unable to perform his art. As a result, the young man feels so depressed that he considers his life wasted. One day, he decides to leave the cap...
